2606.31711.title: Arena-T2I Hard: Benchmarking and Improving Faithfulness with Dependency-Aware Checklist
2606.31711.paper_summary: Faithfulness -- how precisely a generated image aligns with its prompt -- is increasingly central to the real-world utility of text-to-image (T2I) models. Existing faithfulness benchmarks, however, rely on simple atomic instructions, on which top-tier systems already achieve near-perfect scores. As T2I models enter creative workflows, users issue multi-faceted requests combining intricate spatial relationships, stylistic constraints, and complex text rendering. In this setting, a single binary VLM-judge score no longer captures which specific constraints the model fails to satisfy. We introduce Arena-T2I Hard, a 310-prompt stress benchmark drawn from real arena T2I logs, with approximately 30 decomposed yes/no constraints per prompt spanning six categories, including text rendering. The strongest closed-source system we evaluate reaches 0.855 with a 33~pp performance gap across 11 systems, demonstrating substantial discriminative power. Moreover, high public-arena rankings fail to predict faithfulness, confirming that holistic Bradley-Terry (BT) preference scores prioritize aesthetics over fine-grained prompt adherence. We propose a dependency-aware checklist reward that decomposes each prompt into a DAG of yes/no questions and zeroes descendants of failed parents, turning faithfulness into a per-constraint training signal. Combined with a BT aesthetic reward via group-decoupled normalization (GDPO), which standardizes each reward within its rollout group so neither collapses, the recipe attains a strictly better faithfulness-aesthetics trade-off on SD3.5-Medium and FLUX.1-dev under MMRB2 pairwise comparisons than every single-reward, naive weighted-sum, or 4-reward BT-ensemble baseline.
2606.31711.paper_summary_zh: 忠實度——生成的圖像與其提示的精確對齊程度——在文本到圖像（T2I）模型的實際應用中越來越重要。然而，現有的忠實度基準依賴於簡單的原子指令，而頂級系統在這些指令上已經達到了近乎完美的分數。隨著T2I模型進入創意工作流程，使用者發出結合複雜空間關係、風格限制和複雜文本渲染的多面向請求。在這種情況下，單一的二元VLM-judge分數不再能捕捉模型未能滿足的具體約束。我們推出了Arena-T2I Hard，這是一個來自真實競技場T2I日誌的310個提示壓力基準，每個提示大約有30個分解的是/否約束，涵蓋六個類別，包括文本渲染。我們評估的最強封閉源系統達到0.855，並在11個系統中有33個百分點的性能差距，顯示出相當大的區分能力。此外，高公共競技場排名無法預測忠實度，證實整體Bradley-Terry（BT）偏好分數優先考慮美學而非細緻的提示遵循。我們提出了一種依賴性意識的檢查表獎勵，將每個提示分解為一個有向無環圖（DAG）的是/否問題，並將失敗父項的後代歸零，將忠實度轉變為每個約束的訓練信號。結合通過群體解耦正規化（GDPO）的BT美學獎勵，該方法在MMRB2成對比較下，在SD3.5-Medium和FLUX.1-dev上達到了比每個單一獎勵、天真的加權總和或4獎勵BT集成基準更好的忠實度與美學的權衡。
2606.31711.author: Yuanhao Ban et.al.
2606.31711.authors: Yuanhao Ban, Tong Xie, Sohyun An, Yunqi Hong, Evan Frick, I-Hung Hsu, Wei-Lin Chiang, Ion Stoica, Cho-Jui Hsieh
